summary: Well-structured Pester test suite with both unit and integration testing via act. Covers all main task requirements: manifest parsing (JSON and .txt formats), license compliance classification, report generation, and CI/CD workflow validation. Workflow structure tests and actionlint checks are thorough. However, rigor is limited by gaps: complex version specifier parsing (^, ~, >=, <=, ~=) untested, scoped packages (@org/package) absent, config validation only indirect, and exit codes (0/1/2) not directly verified in unit tests. Run-ActTests.ps1 is comprehensive but monolithic (~400 lines). Unit tests are focused and well-organized with good error message assertions. Would catch most regressions in core logic and happy paths, but subtle version-parsing bugs could slip through.
